query:
CREATE TABLE `loginUsers` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`username` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`password` text NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `loginUsers_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `loginUsers_username_unique` UNIQUE(`username`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3sy8Ws9Hms9qTAr.root --database UfcL8CFjdLwbCq7wCKmPsh --execute CREATE TABLE `loginUsers` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`username` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`password` text NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `loginUsers_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `loginUsers_username_unique` UNIQUE(`username`)
);
